name: Windows Hard Link
description: The product opens a file or directory without properly handling that the name is associated with a Windows hard link to a target outside the intended control sphere, allowing attackers to operate on unauthorized files through the link.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a filename that may be a Windows hard link to a file outside the intended directory, which flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that verifies the file's actual location or checks NTFS link count to detect hard links to restricted files
